launched.description: `true` ⇒ child process was spawned. The daemon makes no claim about whether the editor actually opened the file.

command.description: argv joined with spaces, redacted of environment values. Lets the TUI show "launched: code --goto path:12" in a toast.

pid.description: Child PID when available (Unix). `None` when the platform does not expose it or the daemon can't get it.
